title: Zoro Approaches the Fight

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Give it!! Give us candy!! HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's no good, Mochya, run away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You want it all for yourself!?

summary: Zoro Approaches the Fight. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
